cards.name: 5 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: hardship, loss, isolation, feeling abandoned, adversity, struggle, unemployment, alienation, disgrace

cards.name: Queen of Swords, reversed
cards.interpretation: pessimistic, malicious, manipulative, harsh, bitter, spiteful, cruel, deceitful, unforgiving

cards.name: Ace of Wands
cards.interpretation: inspiration, creative spark, new initiative, new passion, enthusiasm, energy
